constraints.coverage_assumption: The user wants only the optimizer block (name + betas + epsilon, plus the immediately tied learning-rate/warmup schedule that the paper specifies together with the optimizer) extracted verbatim from Attention Is All You Need, without consulting other corpus papers for defaults.

normalized_question: Extract the exact optimizer name and its hyperparameters (beta1, beta2, epsilon) as used in the Attention Is All You Need paper, for inclusion in a strict reproduction checklist (optimizer portion only). Do not substitute generic Adam defaults; quote values verbatim from the paper.

obligations.description: What optimizer name is stated in Attention Is All You Need for model training?
What is the exact beta1 value specified for the optimizer in Attention Is All You Need?
What is the exact beta2 value specified for the optimizer in Attention Is All You Need?
What is the exact epsilon value specified for the optimizer in Attention Is All You Need?
What learning rate schedule and warmup steps are paired with the optimizer in Attention Is All You Need (needed to reproduce the optimizer portion faithfully)?

raw_question: Build the optimizer portion of a strict reproduction checklist for Attention Is All You Need: give the optimizer, beta1, beta2, and epsilon exactly as used in the paper, without substituting generic Adam defaults.
